_meta.description: Template structure for a personalised Hajj itinerary. Days are referenced by Hijri date or by an offset from the user's outbound flight. The renderer maps these to actual Gregorian dates from user input.

phases.title: Departure
phases.description: Travel from your home country to Madinah or Jeddah.

phases.title: Madinah
phases.description: Stay in Madinah, visit Masjid an-Nabawi, perform ziyarat.

phases.title: Makkah (Pre-Hajj)
phases.description: Travel to Makkah, perform Umrah, rest before Hajj begins.

days.name: Yawm at-Tarwiyah
days.summary: Enter Ihram for Hajj from your accommodation. Travel to Mina after Fajr. Spend the day and night in Mina performing the five prayers (Dhuhr through Fajr of the 9th).

days.name: Yawm Arafah
days.summary: Travel to Arafah after sunrise. Perform Wuquf from Zawal until sunset. Travel to Muzdalifah after sunset. Pray Maghrib and Isha combined. Spend the night.

days.name: Yawm an-Nahr (Eid al-Adha)
days.summary: Pray Fajr at Muzdalifah. Travel to Mina. Stone Jamarah al-Aqabah (7 pebbles). Sacrifice (or arrange via your operator). Halq or Taqsir. Travel to Makkah for Tawaf al-Ziyarah and Sa'i. Return to Mina.

days.name: First Day of Tashreeq
days.summary: Stay in Mina. Stone all three Jamarat after Zawal (7 pebbles each, in order: small, middle, large).

days.name: Second Day of Tashreeq
days.summary: Stone all three Jamarat after Zawal. To leave Mina early (Nafr Awwal), depart before sunset. Otherwise, stay one more night.

phases.title: Makkah (Post-Hajj)
phases.description: Rest, perform additional Umrah/Tawaf, visit historical sites, prepare for departure.

phases.title: Tawaf al-Wada
phases.description: Perform the Farewell Tawaf as the final ritual before leaving Makkah.

phases.title: Return Home
phases.description: Travel from Jeddah back to your home country.
